questions.stem: Mia ___ her teeth every night.
questions.explanation: every night 表示習慣，Mia 是第三人稱單數，所以用 brushes。

questions.stem: We ___ our hands before lunch every day.
questions.explanation: every day 表示平常會做的事，主詞是 we，所以用 wash。

questions.stem: They ___ to music on the bus every day.
questions.explanation: every day 表示現在的習慣，所以主詞 they 要用 listen。

questions.stem: My brother ___ the door for me every morning.
questions.explanation: every morning 表示習慣，My brother 是第三人稱單數，所以要用 opens。

questions.stem: I ___ my teacher after class every day.
questions.explanation: every day 表示平常的習慣，主詞是 I，所以用 help。

questions.stem: The cat ___ on the sofa in the afternoon.
questions.explanation: in the afternoon 在這裡表示平常下午的習慣，The cat 是第三人稱單數，所以用 sleeps。

questions.stem: Sam ___ to school with his cousin every day.
questions.explanation: every day 表示固定習慣，Sam 是第三人稱單數，所以要用 walks。

questions.stem: Our team ___ soccer on Fridays.
questions.explanation: on Fridays 表示規律發生的事，Our team 視為單數，因此用 practices。

questions.stem: The children ___ games in PE class every Tuesday.
questions.explanation: every Tuesday 表示平常的課表，主詞是複數 children，所以用 play。

questions.stem: Mom ___ tea in the evening.
questions.explanation: in the evening 表示平常晚上的習慣，Mom 是第三人稱單數，所以用 drinks。

questions.stem: I ___ my grandpa every Sunday.
questions.explanation: every Sunday 表示固定習慣，主詞是 I，所以用 call。

questions.stem: The bird ___ above our house every morning.
questions.explanation: every morning 表示習慣，The bird 是第三人稱單數，所以 fly 要變成 flies。

questions.stem: Mia ___ her teeth before bed last night.
questions.explanation: last night 表示過去，因此要用 brushed。

questions.stem: We ___ our hands before lunch yesterday.
questions.explanation: yesterday 表示過去，所以要用 washed。

questions.stem: They ___ to music on the bus this morning.
questions.explanation: this morning 表示已經發生的事，所以用 listened。

questions.stem: My brother ___ the door for me yesterday.
questions.explanation: yesterday 表示過去，因此要用 opened。

questions.stem: I ___ my teacher after class yesterday.
questions.explanation: yesterday 表示過去，所以要用 helped。

questions.stem: The cat ___ on the sofa all afternoon yesterday.
questions.explanation: yesterday 表示過去，因此要用 slept。

questions.stem: Sam ___ to school with his cousin yesterday.
questions.explanation: yesterday 表示過去，所以要用 walked。

questions.stem: Our team ___ soccer last Friday.
questions.explanation: last Friday 表示過去，因此要用 practiced。

questions.stem: The children ___ games in PE class yesterday.
questions.explanation: yesterday 表示過去，所以用 played。

questions.stem: Mom ___ tea last night.
questions.explanation: last night 表示過去，所以要用 drank。

questions.stem: I ___ my grandpa yesterday evening.
questions.explanation: yesterday evening 表示過去，因此要用 called。

questions.stem: The bird ___ above our house this morning.
questions.explanation: this morning 表示已經發生的事，所以要用 flew。

questions.stem: Dad ___ a new lamp two days ago.
questions.explanation: two days ago 表示過去，因此要用 bought。

questions.stem: The girl ___ a shell on the beach yesterday.
questions.explanation: yesterday 表示過去，所以要用 found。

questions.stem: We ___ our lunch to school yesterday.
questions.explanation: yesterday 表示過去，因此要用 brought。

questions.stem: Tina ___ hello to her friend yesterday morning.
questions.explanation: yesterday morning 表示過去，所以要用 said。

questions.stem: The baby ___ happy after the nap yesterday.
questions.explanation: yesterday 表示過去，因此要用 felt。

questions.stem: My uncle ___ our family at the station yesterday.
questions.explanation: yesterday 表示過去，所以要用 met。
